name: seo-analysis
description: SEO analysis and optimization specialist. Use when conducting technical
capabilities: Conduct technical SEO audits of website structure and crawlability
Optimize title tags and meta descriptions for better click-through rates
Analyze Core Web Vitals metrics and suggest improvements
Implement structured data and schema markup
Improve internal linking structure and anchor text
author: Joseph OBrien
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based skill containing only documentation and guidance. No executable code, no network access, no filesystem access, no external command execution. Safe for installation. All 36 static findings are false positives from misidentified patterns in documentation files.
valueStatement: SEO analysis helps improve website visibility in search engines. This skill provides actionable recommendations for technical SEO, meta tags, Core Web Vitals, and schema markup to boost rankings.
limitations: Cannot access live websites to perform automated scans
Cannot modify files or deploy changes directly
Cannot generate real-time performance metrics without external tools

useCases.title: Fix technical SEO issues
useCases.description: Identify crawlability problems, redirect chains, and canonical issues affecting search rankings.

useCases.title: Optimize meta tags
useCases.description: Create compelling titles and descriptions that improve click-through rates from search results.

useCases.title: Improve page performance
useCases.description: Receive actionable recommendations for Core Web Vitals to enhance user experience and SEO.

promptTemplates.title: Basic SEO audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Conduct a technical SEO audit of my website and identify the top issues affecting search rankings.

promptTemplates.title: Meta tag optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Optimize the meta title and description for my homepage to improve click-through rates.

promptTemplates.title: Core Web Vitals
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze my Core Web Vitals scores and suggest specific improvements for LCP, FID, and CLS.

promptTemplates.title: Schema implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement schema markup for my product pages to enhance search result appearance.

bestPractices: Focus on user intent when optimizing content for target keywords
Ensure website is fully crawlable before addressing other SEO factors
Monitor Core Web Vitals regularly as they directly impact rankings
antiPatterns: Keyword stuffing in titles and descriptions
Using duplicate meta descriptions across multiple pages

faq.question: Which AI tools work with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for SEO analysis tasks.

faq.question: What are the character limits for meta tags?
faq.answer: Title tags should be 50-60 characters. Meta descriptions should be 150-160 characters.

faq.question: Can this skill scan my live website?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance and recommendations. Use external tools for automated website scanning.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This is a prompt-based skill that processes text locally without sending data to external services.

faq.question: Why are my Core Web Vitals scores low?
faq.answer: Common causes include large images, render-blocking resources, and layout shifts. The skill provides specific fixes for each metric.

faq.question: How is this different from online SEO tools?
faq.answer: This skill provides expert guidance and recommendations rather than automated scanning. Combine with tools like PageSpeed Insights for best results.
